title: running make inside Makefile seems weird
body:
https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/blob/579103a25c76ab3e8c3a2b1fbf7beb6226ba8e08/Makefile#L32

The `docs` target in Makefile should have the go-md2man build step to build docs and not just run make again.
Similar comment for the `install` target as well.

comments.body: Not sure what you want. Could you open a PR with what you would like.  We are just calling down and executing the docs/Makefile here
stupid of me, sorry about this ..closing..
